questionHtml: Describe the structure and bonding in solid sodium oxide.
markschemeHtml:
«3-D/giant» regularly repeating arrangement «of ions»
OR
lattice «of ions»    [✔]

 

electrostatic attraction between oppositely charged ions
OR
electrostatic attraction between Na+ and O2− ions    [✔]

 

Note: Do not accept “ionic” without description.

meta.title: Describe the structure and bonding in solid sodium oxide.
